title: BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT AND OPERATIONS MANAGER
description:
Overview

We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Sales& Operations Officer to manage diverse tasks, from client acquisition to on-site staff management. This role involves driving business growth through sales and ensuring efficient and quality service to meet client expectations.

Key Responsibilities

Sales & Business Development

  • Identify and secure new business opportunities in the cleaning and facility services sector. 
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with new and existing clients. 
  • Prepare proposals, quotations, and service agreements.
  • Monitor sales pipelines and provide weekly performance updates.

Operations Management

  • Coordinate daily cleaning operations to ensure efficiency and excellent service delivery.
  • Manage staff schedules, assignments, and deployment across sites.
  • Conduct site inspections and ensure compliance with service standards.
  • Support recruitment, onboarding, and training of cleaning personnel.
  • Handle customer feedback, service issues, and incident reports professionally.

Qualifications

  • Minimum 2–3 years’ experience in sales, operations, or account management (cleaning/facility services experience is an advantage).
  • Strong communication, negotiation, and client-handling skills.
  • Good organizational and problem-solving abilities.
  • Ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.
  • Proficiency in MS Office or relevant software tools.
  • Driver’s license is an advantage (if site visits are required).

For interested applicants, please include the following details in your resume and submit it in PDF format:

  • Current Salary
  • Expected Salary
  • Notice Period

postedCompany.description:
OAKDENE MANAGEMENT PTE LTD specializes in comprehensive commercial & residential solutions. It’s a member of the OAKDENE GROUP OF COMPANIES, reflecting a shared commitment to excellence, reliability, and service innovation across all its business entities.

We know a clean well-maintained environment is crucial for health, safety, and creating a positive professional image. Whether servicing commercial properties, office buildings, retail spaces, or private residences, our team of trained professionals apply high standards of quality and efficiency to deliver outstanding results.


Sustainability is at the heart of our operations. We are committed to integrating eco-friendly practices and using environmentally certified products across all projects, reducing our ecological footprint while maintaining service excellence. Our sustainability initiatives are a testament to our vision of building a cleaner, greener future.

Our passion for service excellence, continuous innovation, and client satisfaction inspires us to be a trusted leader in the services sector. Our dedication is to form long-term partnerships with our clients by consistently delivering superior results, embracing industry best practices, and investing in the professional development of our team.

We go beyond cleaning and management. We create healthier, safer, and more sustainable environments where businesses and communities can flourish.
postedCompany.name: OAKDENE MANAGEMENT PTE. LTD.
